name: Research Quality Judge
criteria: The answer directly and completely addresses the user's question.
Every factual claim is grounded in one of the cited sources.
Contradictions or knowledge gaps are explicitly noted.
No facts are asserted that cannot be traced to the source material.
The answer is written at an appropriate level of depth for the question.

name: Document Quality Judge
criteria: The document structure matches the requested format and length.
Every section directly supports the stated document goal.
Claims are grounded in the provided evidence or research context.
The tone and language are appropriate for the intended audience.
No placeholder text, incomplete sections, or contradictory instructions remain.
